title: Primary Constructor
description: Define a class with properties directly in the primary constructor header.
problemStatement:
Kotlin is concise! Define a class `Person` with two properties directly in the constructor: `val name: String` and `val age: Int`. Instantiate it with `"Alice"` and `25`, then print the name.

**Expected Output:** `Alice`.
hints: Using `val` or `var` in the constructor header automatically creates properties.
